## Meeting Purpose

[Catch up and discuss GrowthX's progress, design engineering roles, and potential future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has doubled revenue to $11M ARR, expanded services, and signed notable clients (Lovable, Surge.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Currently at 70 staff (15 in EPD), preparing for potential Series A and accelerated growth](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Design engineer roles differ between "deliver" (visual/website) and "build" (product/engineering) sides](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Hiring may accelerate in October, with evolving needs for design engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Company Update

  - [Doubled revenue to $11M ARR since Renato joined](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)
  - [Expanded from programmatic SEO to full-service marketing, including brand identities](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)
  - [70 staff total, \~15 in EPD (Engineering, Product, Design)](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=356.0)
  - [Notable new clients: Lovable, Surge.ai](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Using proprietary software for faster delivery, focusing on workflow and programmatic content](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)
  - [Potential Series A round and accelerated growth on the horizon](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

### Design Engineering Roles and Skills

  - [Two areas: "deliver" (agency-style) and "build" (product/engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Build side seeks engineers with strong front-end skills and solid design abilities](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Key skills: interaction design, understanding system architecture, maintaining high-level perspective](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Currently using off-the-shelf components, minimal custom work](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=722.0)
  - [Deliver side more focused on visual talent for client-facing work](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Remote work culture requires proactive communication and self-management](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### Hiring Plans and Challenges

  - [Open design engineer role, but not highest priority currently](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Anticipating accelerated hiring around October](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [May split into multiple roles as needs evolve](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Seeking candidates similar to Giampiero's archetype: engineering background with strong design skills](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Remote work culture fit is crucial: proactive communication, self-driven, autonomous](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)

### The Search Experience Services

  - [Dan now working with The Search Experience, offering tailored recruiting services](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)
  - [Specializes in design roles, with colleagues covering engineering and go-to-market](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)
  - [Provides comprehensive team building support across multiple disciplines](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Dan to send service overview and client examples via email](https://fathom.video/share/D568jyCmNA9Eamv9QVVB7j3gFx6xiyF4?tab=summary&timestamp=1439.0)
